theme: Machinist choosing what to measure everything from
title: Datum Tree Error Budget: What to Measure Everything From
strategies: trivial: attach every feature to its first-listed (deep) allowed datum and buy no precise slots -- reproduces the checker baseline (~0.1)
greedy: shallowest datum tree, then spend precise slots on the deepest / longest datum chains -- weight- and betweenness-blind, wastes the budget on private chains

strong: route every critical pair through a common deep trunk and allocate precise slots by criticality-weighted path-betweenness on the bottleneck, so a few shared trunk edges cap the weighted worst case
open: co-optimize the datum tree and slot allocation jointly, then reinvest any leftover budget on the residual private edges of the top-weighted pairs
